header: The boring details that save you money later
subheadline: Unglamorous decisions, made once by us, that keep a Desiderio site fast to edit and cheap to maintain for years.

items.title: Semantic markup
items.description_text: Landmarks, heading order, and lean HTML in every element template.

items.title: BEM component CSS
items.description_text: Predictable class names, zero inline styles — enforced by the audit.

items.title: Container queries
items.description_text: Elements respond to their column, not just the viewport width.

items.title: No frontend framework
items.description_text: Vanilla JavaScript glue only — nothing extra to upgrade, ever.
